description: section-banner comments that divide a class into fake modules instead of using actual concerns
input:
class Account < ApplicationRecord
  # ==========================================
  # BILLING METHODS
  # ==========================================

  def billable? = subscription.active?

  def cancel_subscription
    subscription.cancel!
  end

  # ==========================================
  # CLOSURE METHODS
  # ==========================================

  def terminate
    update!(state: :terminated)
  end

  # ==========================================
  # SEARCH METHODS
  # ==========================================

  def self.search(query)
    where("name ILIKE ?", "%#{query}%")
  end
end
